commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=c40405181c31deaa80afa391a25f74ded319be36)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a bundled-path guard to onboarding local plugin path recording, moves doctor bundled-path cleanup to the end of repair sequencing, and carries JSON read retry changes that are already present on current main.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main still has update sync code and tests that re-add current bundled roots to `plugins.load.paths`, while discovery and doctor warn on or remove the same path class. I did not run the mutating `doctor --fix` flow in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor or maintainer PR changes plus real behavior proof; this is not a ClawSweeper repair-lane candidate while the contributor proof gate is missing.

target.title: fix(#85334): prevent bundled plugin load paths from being injected into config
target.body:
## Background

`openclaw doctor --fix` was automatically adding bundled plugin paths (e.g., `memory-wiki`) to `plugins.load.paths` in `openclaw.json`. This produced a redundant-path warning on the next doctor run, creating a cycle: fix → adds path → warns → fix → adds path again.

## Changes

### A — `src/commands/onboarding-plugin-install.ts`

Added a bundled root guard in `addPluginLoadPath()`. Before writing a plugin path to `plugins.load.paths`, check whether it resolves to OpenClaw's bundled plugin directory via `resolvePackagedBundledLoadPathAlias` — the same function used by `discovery.ts` to emit the redundant-path warning. Bundled plugins are auto-discovered and do not need a config entry.

Non-bundled (external) plugins are unaffected.

### B — `src/commands/doctor/repair-sequencing.ts`

Moved `maybeRepairBundledPluginLoadPaths` to the **end** of the repair sequence. Previously it ran mid-sequence, but subsequent steps (`repairMissingConfiguredPluginInstalls`, `applyPluginAutoEnable`) could re-add the bundled path, leaving a dirty config to be persisted.

## Testing

- [ ] Mac mini: run `doctor --fix`, verify no redundant memory-wiki path in `plugins.load.paths`
- [ ] VPS: same test
- [ ] `doctor --fix` idempotent: second run produces same output

Closes #85334
target.author: samson1357924
